title: The Blind Doe
content:
A poor half-blind Doe her one eye
    Kept shoreward, all danger to spy,
    As she fed by the sea,
    Poor innocent! she
    Was shot from a boat passing by.

    Watch On All Sides
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Blind Doe"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
